name: stage2-rvv-low-precision-contraction-primitive-surface-gate1
title: Stage2 RVV low-precision contraction primitive surface campaign
description: Macro campaign for RVV low-precision contraction primitives; Gates 1-3 are complete and Gate 4 is active for Gearbox/resource-aware selected-body realization plus measured same-target comparison.
creator: codex
notes: Gates 1-3 are complete. Gate 4 primitive source/load/extension and widening-product role/policy facts already flow through Gearbox resource admission, selected-body realization handoff, route metadata, target artifact mirrors, target support bundle export, same-target measurement records, and production-pressure policy inputs with fail-closed stale provenance checks. Current Gate 4 measured-comparison slice audited the packed-i4 dequant-clamp path, found no safe production resource-schedule win without a new provider-owned repair plus fresh same-target timing, and hardened the target fixture so emitted C++ must show low/high i4 unpack, two widening products, pair-sum, single vwredsum, and f32 clamp/store before no-win policy denial can be trusted. Macro remains active; next continuation is a real packed-i4 schedule/resource repair plus new same-target timing, or continued explicit no-win performance-preference denial.
